zh.lifeSummary: 當Anthony Staunton於大約1472年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾史道頓時，他的父親Thomas Staunton34歲，母親Anne Pourmont32歲。他於1503年之前與Edith Neville在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1560年3月11日在英國諾廷加姆爾史道頓享年89歲，埋葬在英國諾廷加姆爾史道頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anthony Staunton于大约1472年出生在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾史道頓时，他的父亲Thomas Staunton34岁，母亲Anne Pourmont32岁。他于1503年之前与Edith Neville在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1560年3月11日在英国諾廷加姆爾史道頓享年89岁，埋葬在英国諾廷加姆爾史道頓。

nameMeanings.name: Staunton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Caitlin, Ciaran, Cormac.

English and Irish: variant of Stanton . This English name has been established (in this spelling) since medieval times in Ireland (Mayo, Connacht), where it has been Gaelicized as de Stonndún. Compare McEvilly .

variants.name: McEvilly
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac an Mhílidh ‘son of the knight’, from Gaelic míleadh ‘warrior, knight’. In County Mayo and County Cork, a family of English origin Gaelicized their name from Staunton to Mac an Mhílidh, apparently because of the latter's presumed similarity to the name of their ancestor, Milo de Stanton.

variants.name: Stanton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places in England called Stanton or Staunton, especially Stanton in Staffordshire and Staunton in Worcestershire, all named with Old English stān ‘stone’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Most of the placenames come from their situation on stony ground, but in the case of Stanton Harcourt in Oxfordshire and Stanton Drew in Avon the reference is to the proximity of prehistoric stone monuments. The name has also sometimes been chosen by Ashkenazic Jews as an Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish surnames. This surname has also long been established in Ireland (especially Mayo).

nameMeanings.name: Anthony
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual English form of the old Roman family name Antonius, which is of uncertain (probably Etruscan) origin. The spelling with -th- (not normally reflected in the pronunciation) represents a learned but erroneous attempt to associate it with Greek anthos ‘flower’. In the post-classical period it was a common name, borne by various early saints, most notably a 3rd-century Egyptian hermit monk, who is regarded as the founder of Christian monasticism.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Anthony Staunton was born about 1472, in Staunton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Staunton, was 34 and his mother, Anne Pourmont, was 32. He married Edith Neville before 1503, in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 11 March 1560, in Staunton, Nottinghamshire, England, at the age of 89, and was buried in Staunton, Nottinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anthony Staunton est né environ 1472, à Staunton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Staunton, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Anne Pourmont, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Edith Neville avant 1503, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 11 mars 1560, à Staunton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 89 ans, et a été enterré à Staunton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anthony Staunton um 1472 in Staunton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Staunton 34 und seine Mutter Anne Pourmont 32. Er hat vor 1503 in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Edith Neville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 11. März 1560 im Alter von 89 Jahren in Staunton, Nottinghamshire, England und wurde in Staunton, Nottinghamshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anthony Staunton è nato il circa 1472 nel Staunton, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Staunton, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Anne Pourmont, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Edith Neville prima del 1503, nel Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 11 marzo 1560, nel Staunton, Nottinghamshire, England, all'età di 89 anni, e fu sepolto a Staunton, Nottinghamshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Anthony Stauntonが約1472年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアスタウントンで生まれた時，父Thomas Stauntonは34歳，母Anne Pourmontは32歳であった。1503年以前にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアでEdith Nevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1560年3月11日にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアスタウントンで89歳で死去し，イギリスノッティンガムシュアイアスタウントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anthony Staunton(이)가 대략 1472년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 스타운턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Staunton(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Pourmont(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1503년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르에서 Edith Neville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1560년 3월 11일 영국 노틴그함실르 스타운턴에서 89세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노틴그함실르 스타운턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anthony Staunton nasceu aproximadamente 1472, em Staunton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Staunton, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Anne Pourmont, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Edith Neville antes 1503, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 11 de março de 1560, em Staunton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 89 anos, e foi sepultado em Staunton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anthony Staunton родился около 1472 г. в местности стаунтон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Staunton было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Anne Pourmont, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Edith Neville перед 1503 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер 11 марта 1560 г. в местности стаунтон, ноттингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 89 лет и был похоронен в местности стаунтон, ноттингхамшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anthony Staunton nació aproximadamente 1472, en Staunton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Staunton, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Anne Pourmont, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Edith Neville antes de 1503, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 11 de marzo de 1560, en Staunton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 89 años, y fue sepultado en Staunton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra.
